slide1.title: Wellcome to e-Secrets
slide1.message: The most simple and easy way to keep all your passwords and secrets safe.

slide2.title: The problem
slide2.message1: Are you struggle managing to keep many passwords and login credentials from different web sites, email, social networks or any other electronic accounts?
slide2.message2: And because of this you keep the same password for all of them?
slide2.message3: This is very unsafe and you may be at risk of being hacked.
slide2.message4: take care of this for you with only one password.

slide3.title: What is e-Secrets?
slide3.message: is a secrets manager that aims to keep safe all your electronic private information, in a simple and easy way.

slide4.title: How it works?
slide4.message1: All your data is stored locally on your device in an electronic vault that is sealed using the most advanced and updated encryption technologies (RSA and AES256).
slide4.message2: This vault can only be unsealed by your master password, or using the biometric verification methods provided by your device.

slide5.title: Here are some features
slide5.message2: Data stored locally and sealed with strong cryptography
slide5.message3: Backup your data on the cloud
slide5.message4: Restore your data at any time from any device
slide5.message5: Keep any type of information, from a single password to many other private information like, email, web account, social network, bank account, cred card and many others

slide6.title: Databse setup
slide6.message1: If this is your first time here, than you should choose
slide6.message3: If you already used the app before, than you can restore your database from the cloud.

data-choose.title: Data restore
data-choose.message: We found more than one data base that can be restored. Please choose which one you'd like to restore.

no-restore-alert.title: No files found
no-restore-alert.message: No files found to be restored. You need to create a new data base.

pwd-creation.title: Password creation
pwd-creation.message: Create a master password that will be used to unseal your secrets.

askbio.title: Biometric
askbio.message: Would you like to unseal using biometric? You can always enable/disable this option on the settings page.

start.biometric-failed: Biometric verification failed. Please try agin.

creds.title: Biometric credentials
creds.message: Type the master password to create the biometric credentials.

wipe.title: Wipe data
wipe.message: All the application data and settings will be erased from your device. Do you wan to proceed?

remove.title: Remove item
remove.message: You really want to remove this item?
